ocr_findings.description: 問題13-9 presents E-R diagram choices (ア/イ/ウ/エ) as visual box-and-arrow diagrams in the image. OCR renders them as pipe-delimited table rows '| 出版社 → 著者 → 本' etc., losing the box visual but preserving the arrow direction text. The semantic content of the arrows is maintained.
Answer line '問題13-8 エ　問題13-9 ア　問題13-10 ア' appears at top of OCR (line 1) but is at the bottom of the image page. Reading order inversion for the answer key line.

reviewer_notes: Exam page with 3 past questions (13-8, 13-9, 13-10) in ア/イ/ウ/エ format. All question bodies and answer choices are correctly transcribed. The E-R diagram boxes in 13-9 are simplified to text arrows which preserves the logical content. Answer key line order inversion (placed first in OCR instead of last) is a minor order issue. Label correctly exam.
